gui.lumymon.kanto_cartography_table.name: Kanto Cartography Table
tooltip.lumymon.ancient_dna: Can be used in the §3Resurrection Machine§r with a §eCloning Catalyst§r to create §5Mewtwo§r, or crafted into an §eOrigin Fossil§r to awaken §dMew§r
tooltip.lumymon.origin_fossil: Contains the genetic code to revive §dMew§r within the §3Mew Shrine§r
tooltip.lumymon.cloning_catalyst: Catalyzes the creation of §5Mewtwo§r in the §3Resurrection Machine§r when paired with §bAncient DNA§r
tooltip.lumymon.synthetic_matrix: Essential component used in the creation of the §3Rocket Armor§r
tooltip.lumymon.rocket_armor_remove: Right-click again to remove the armor§r
tooltip.lumymon.silver_wing: Required to summon §3Lugia§r at the §bWhirl Island§r
tooltip.lumymon.rainbow_wing: Required to summon §6Ho-Oh§r at the §eBell Tower§r
tooltip.lumymon.corrupted_shard: Used to craft the §3Shadow Soul Stone§r
tooltip.lumymon.shadow_heart: The central component for the §3Shadow Soul Stone§r
tooltip.lumymon.shadow_soul_stone_revert: Right-click again to revert the process§r
tooltip.lumymon.gs_ball: Reveals the presence of §3Celebi§r within the §2Ilex Shrine§r
tooltip.lumymon.ice_ore: Contains the §bCryo Relic§r, necessary to summon §bRegice§r
tooltip.lumymon.rock_ore: Contains the §6Pebble Relic§r, necessary to summon §6Regirock§r
tooltip.lumymon.steel_ore: Contains the §7Metal Relic§r, necessary to summon §7Registeel§r
tooltip.lumymon.electron_ore: Contains the §eSpark Relic§r, necessary to summon §eRegieleki§r
tooltip.lumymon.dragon_ore: Contains the §4Draco Relic§r, necessary to summon §4Regidrago§r
tooltip.lumymon.titan_relic: Forged to awaken §2Regigigas§r within the §bSnowpoint Temple§r
tooltip.lumymon.ruby_dew: Attracts §cLatias§r to its §4Altar§r in the §aSecret Garden§r
tooltip.lumymon.sapphire_dew: Attracts §9Latios§r to its §1Altar§r in the §aSecret Garden§r
tooltip.lumymon.primordial_gem: Embodies the essence of §9Kyogre§r. Essential component for the §bSky Core§r
tooltip.lumymon.desolate_gem: Embodies the essence of §cGroudon§r. Essential component for the §bSky Core§r
tooltip.lumymon.geostone: When exposed to the high temperatures of a blast furnace, it softens into a primal §cMolten Crust§r
tooltip.lumymon.heatstone: When exposed to the high temperatures of a blast furnace, it softens into a primal §cMolten Crust§r
tooltip.lumymon.molten_crust: A searing fragment of the continental mantle. Used in the creation of the §6Earth Core§r
tooltip.lumymon.sky_core: Required to summon §eMega §aRayquaza§r at the §bSky Pillar§r
tooltip.lumymon.aether_gem: Embodies the spirit of the §5Draconids§r. Essential component for the §bSky Core§r
tooltip.lumymon.emerald_emblem: Catalyzes the creation of the powerful §bSky Core§r
tooltip.lumymon.melodic_tape_vol_1: Plays the gentle melody that awakens §eJirachi§r within the §3Wish Cave§r
tooltip.lumymon.meteorite_crystal: Used to call §5Deoxys§r back to its §3Shrine§r
tooltip.lumymon.azelf_fang: Return this to the Altar to show §bAzelf§r that §9Lake Valor§r is safe once more
tooltip.lumymon.mesprit_plume: Return this to the Altar to show §dMesprit§r that §5Lake Verity§r is safe once more
tooltip.lumymon.uxie_claw: Return this to the Altar to show §eUxie§r that §6Lake Acuity§r is safe once more
tooltip.lumymon.willpower_jewel: A spark of gratitude from §bAzelf§r. Necessary to reforge a damaged §cRed Chain§r
tooltip.lumymon.emotion_jewel: A token of gratitude from §dMesprit§r. Necessary to repair a broken §cRed Chain§r
tooltip.lumymon.knowledge_jewel: A gift of gratitude from §eUxie§r. Necessary to mend a shattered §cRed Chain§r
tooltip.lumymon.temporal_flute: Sacred flute that echoes with the heartbeat of §9Time§r
tooltip.lumymon.spatial_flute: Sacred flute that vibrates with the expansion of §dSpace§r
tooltip.lumymon.heat_fragment: A substantial portion of a shattered §cMagma Stone§r
tooltip.lumymon.heat_splinter: A jagged sliver of a shattered §cMagma Stone§r
tooltip.lumymon.magmatic_cluster: It must regain its heat within the §6Stark Forge§r
tooltip.lumymon.magma_stone: Formed from boulders melted in magma, this stone summons §cHeatran§r at its §4Altar§r
tooltip.lumymon.stark_forge: The only §clava-fueled§r furnace capable of tempering the §6Magma Stone§r
tooltip.lumymon.dream_catcher: Channels the lunar glow to call upon §dCresselia§r at its Altar
tooltip.lumymon.nightmare_weaver: Tears through the veil of shadows to manifest §8Darkrai§r at its Shrine
tooltip.lumymon.dream_string: The ethereal material used to weave the §dDream Catcher§r
tooltip.lumymon.nightmare_string: The obscure material used to weave the §8Nightmare Weaver§r
tooltip.lumymon.lunar_wing: Use it in the §5Nightmare Dimension§r to escape the shadows
tooltip.lumymon.moonlight_amulet: Sleep with this in your hand to cross the veil into the §5Nightmare Dimension§r
tooltip.lumymon.red_chain: Binds the rulers of §9Time§r, §dSpace§r and §8Antimatter§r. Use it on their altars to summon them
tooltip.lumymon.broken_red_chain: Requires the §eKnowledge§r, §dEmotion§r and §bWillpower§r of the §6Lake Guardians§r to be reforged
tooltip.lumymon.torn_journal: An old, stab-bound diary in a traditional style. It has been torn and is missing the latter half of its pages
tooltip.lumymon.torn_page: A loose page from an old journal. Its text speaks of a place where space and time distort
tooltip.lumymon.prof_oak_letter: Infused with the scent of §dGracideas§r, invites §aShaymin§r to the §2Flower Paradise§r shrine
tooltip.lumymon.faded_letter: Its floral scent is gone. Restore with §dGracidea Flowers§r to call for §aShaymin§r again
tooltip.lumymon.iceroot_carrot: Awakens the §bGlacial Steed§r in the §6Crown Spire§r
tooltip.lumymon.shaderoot_carrot: Awakens the §5Spectral Steed§r in the §6Crown Cemetery§r
tooltip.lumymon.calyrex_crown: Placed upon its §estatue§r summons the §aKing of Bountiful Harvests§r
tooltip.lumymon.fossilized_helmet: Used in the §3Resurrection Machine§r to create §5Type: Null§r

tooltip.lumymon.split_decision_radar: Locates the ancient temple where §eRegieleki§r and §cRegidrago§r are bound by a single choice

tooltip.lumymon.calyrex_shadow_radar: Locates the §8Crown Cemetery§r, shrine of §2Calyrex§r and §5Spectrier§r

tooltip.lumymon.wochien_radar: Locates the §dGrasswither Shrine§r, where the §2Tablets of Ruin§r drain the life from every leaf and field
tooltip.lumymon.chienpao_radar: Locates the §eIcerend Shrine§r, where the §bSword of Ruin§r commands a hundred tons of fallen snow
tooltip.lumymon.tinglu_radar: Locates the §aGroundblight Shrine§r, where the §6Vessel of Ruin§r opens fissures deep within the earth
tooltip.lumymon.chiyu_radar: Locates the §bFirescourge Shrine§r, where the §cBeads of Ruin§r melt solid rock into rivers of lava

tooltip.lumymon.draconic_fin: Required item to locate the §dSinnoh League

tooltip.lumymon.store_card: Locates the nearest §bDepartment Store§r for convenient shopping

pc.lumymon.class_not_found: PC Error: Please ensure Cobblemon is installed and up-to-date.
pc.lumymon.critical_error: PC Error: Could not open the PC. None of the known Cobblemon API versions are supported.
pc.lumymon.generic_error: PC Error: A general runtime error occurred while trying to open the PC.
ram.lumymon.title: WARNING: Insufficient RAM detected!
ram.lumymon.message1: To fully enjoy COBBLEVERSE, we recommend allocating at least %s MB of RAM
ram.lumymon.message2: Only %s MB are currently allocated. Please adjust your launcher settings
ram.lumymon.message3: Continuing may cause lag and lead to an unstable experience
welcome.lumymon.title: COBBLEVERSE celebrates Pokémon’s 30th Anniversary!
welcome.lumymon.header: IMPORTANT: If you have just updated, backup your worlds!
welcome.lumymon.line1: This update focuses on performance optimizations,
welcome.lumymon.line2: bug fixes and several quality-of-life improvements
welcome.lumymon.line3_end: for a complete list of all new features and changes
welcome.lumymon.line4: Please report any feedback and bugs on our %s
reward.lumymon.congratulations: 🏆 Congratulations, Champion! You received a special %s!
reward.lumymon.location.pc: The Pokémon was added to your PC!
reward.lumymon.location.party: The Pokémon was added to your party!
message.lumymon.pokemon_already_nearby: %s is already nearby! Catch it or defeat it first
message.lumymon.spacetime_altar.needs_ch: The altar reacts to the §6Orb§r... Use a §cRed Chain§r to channel its power
message.lumymon.spacetime_altar.needs_or: The §cRed Chain§r has nothing to bind. Place a §6Legendary Orb §ffirst
message.lumymon.spacetime_altar.empty_hi: This ancient altar needs an §bAdamant Orb§r or a §dLustrous Orb§r
message.lumymon.spacetime_altar.active: The altar is active. Use a §cRed Chain§r to bind the Master of §6%s§r!
message.lumymon.arceus_ritual: All the Plates are gathered... The Original One approaches!
message.lumymon.arceus_pedestal.hint: This pedestal seems to require an §eArceus Plate
message.lumymon.arceus_pedestal.locked: §6The Plate is bound by ritual energy! §7(Cannot be removed now)
message.lumymon.arceus_pedestal.already_: §eThis pedestal is already holding a Plate. §7(Empty hand to retrieve)
message.lumymon.arceus_pedestal.duplicat: §cAn identical Plate is already placed nearby!
message.lumymon.falling_asleep: The amulet pulses with a cold light: the Nightmare beckons...
message.lumymon.lunar_wing_no_effect: The Lunar Wing flickers, but the reality here is too stable to break
message.lumymon.nightmare_enter: You've entered the Newmoon Island: beware of the shadows...
message.lumymon.nightmare_escape: The lunar light guides you back to the waking world
message.lumymon.nightmare_fading: The nightmare is beginning to fade...
message.lumymon.woke_up: You have awakened from the terrifying nightmare
message.lumymon.flute_incomplete: The melody feels incomplete... This instrument must be united with something else
message.lumymon.titan_relic_needed: A %s is required to awaken this Legendary Pokémon
message.lumymon.regigigas_awakening_fail: The statue remains silent... You must have §6Regirock§r, §bRegice§r, §7Registeel§r, §eRegieleki§r, and §4Regidrago§r in your party
message.lumymon.articuno_summoned: Articuno has descended: a chilling breeze heralds the coming of winter!
message.lumymon.zapdos_summoned: Zapdos has struck: the air crackles with the raw power of a legendary storm!
message.lumymon.moltres_summoned: Moltres ignites the air: the sky blazes with the heat of a thousand summers!
message.lumymon.mew_summoned: The Origin Fossil pulses with life: the ancestor of all Pokémon reveals itself!
message.lumymon.hooh_summoned: The rainbow bird Ho-Oh descends from the heavens in a flurry of sacred flames!
message.lumymon.lugia_summoned: The guardian of the seas Lugia emerges from the depths with a mighty roar!
message.lumymon.celebi_summoned: The GS Ball resonates with the shrine: Celebi transcends time to answer your call!
message.lumymon.regice_summoned: The ice from the age of glaciers begins to stir: Regice has awakened!
message.lumymon.regidrago_summoned: The dragon's roar echoes from the ancient core: Regidrago has manifested its fury!
message.lumymon.regieleki_summoned: A surge of infinite energy shatters the silence: the lightning giant Regieleki has sparked to life!
message.lumymon.regirock_summoned: An echo from the Stone Age resounds through the altar: the eternal titan Regirock stands tall!
message.lumymon.registeel_summoned: The grind of ancient gears fills the air: Registeel has been reactivated!
message.lumymon.regigigas_awakened: Regigigas has awakened from its ancient slumber!
message.lumymon.latias_summoned: A flash of red light streaks across the sky: Latias has arrived, sensing your presence!
message.lumymon.latios_summoned: The air shimmers as a blue shadow descends: Latios has appeared to test your strength!
message.lumymon.kyogre_summoned: The sea level rises: Kyogre has emerged from the depths!
message.lumymon.groudon_summoned: The volcano erupts in fury: Groudon has burst forth from the magma!
message.lumymon.mega_rayquaza_summoned: The heavens part as the Dragon of the Skies descends: Mega Rayquaza has come to restore order!
message.lumymon.deoxys_summoned: A rift in space opens: Deoxys has arrived!
message.lumymon.jirachi_summoned: The stars align and your wish is heard: Jirachi has appeared!
message.lumymon.twin_giants_choice: §7§oA voice echoes: §6"You have made your choice in this temple..."
message.lumymon.shaymin_summoned: The Pokémon of Gratitude has appeared, guided by the sweet aroma of your letter!
message.lumymon.letter_faded: The essence of the flowers flows into the shrine, leaving the letter faded
message.lumymon.mesprit_summoned: Mesprit has appeared: your heart swells with newfound emotions!
message.lumymon.azelf_summoned: Azelf has appeared: a surge of absolute willpower ignites your spirit!
message.lumymon.uxie_summoned: Uxie has appeared: a sudden wave of great knowledge enlightens your mind!
message.lumymon.dialga_awakened: Dialga has appeared from the distortions of time!
message.lumymon.palkia_awakened: Palkia has appeared from the distortions of space!
message.lumymon.heatran_summoned: The cave walls melt: Heatran has crawled from the magma!
message.lumymon.giratina_summoned: The barrier between worlds shatters: Giratina has torn through the void!
message.lumymon.calyrex_summoned: The High King of the Harvest has returned: the crown glows with the power to mend the land!
message.lumymon.azure_flute.blacklisted: The flute remains silent... This dimension's energy suppresses its divine echo
message.lumymon.cresselia_awakening: A soothing melody echoes from the floor below... you feel a new presence and your negative thoughts immediately fade away as your mind grows serene
message.lumymon.wake_up_from_nightmare: The lunar light guides you back to the waking world...
message.lumymon.origin_no_sleep: Mortal rest is forbidden in this timeless dimension...
message.lumymon.nightmare_bed_vanish: The bed dissolves into the shadows...
message.lumymon.darkrai_arrival: You feel a sinister shadow lurking in the darkness right under your feet... The real nightmare has just begun
message.lumymon.distortion_portal_wrong_: This portal can only be activated within the Distortion World
message.lumymon.elevator.missing_advance: The Champion awaits only the truly worthy
message.lumymon.raid.inventory_full: Inventory full! Raid Cheers dropped on the ground
